original_synthesis.one_sentence_direction: A guided decision trail where each screen clears one patch of fog and turns scattered evidence into the next safe commitment.
original_synthesis.core_metaphor_or_shape: A left-edge commitment trail with evidence notes branching from each step.
signature_interactions: Pin one signal onto the trail
Reveal why a branch is locked or risky

reference_synthesis.transformed_into: one-signal activation card that starts the trail instead of a form
persistent commitment rail showing prior and next decisions
evidence margin attached to each commitment
commit button mutates the trail and reveals the next repair state

explicitly_rejected_patterns: metric tiles as first useful screen
